mapper.select: SELECT * FROM pomodoro_sessions WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM pomodoro_sessions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pomodoro_sessions (user_id, task_id, start_time, duration_minutes, status, session_type, task_description) VALUES (#{userId}, #{taskId}, #{startTime}, #{durationMinutes}, #{status}, #{sessionType}, #{taskDescription})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pomodoro_sessions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND start_time BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}
SELECT SUM(actual_minutes) FROM pomodoro_sessions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'completed' AND start_time BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pomodoro_sessions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = #{status} AND start_time BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}
SELECT * FROM pomodoro_sessions WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM pomodoro_sessions WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT DISTINCT DATE(start_time) FROM pomodoro_sessions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'completed' ORDER BY DATE(start_time) DESC
SELECT session_type as sessionType, SUM(actual_minutes) as totalMinutes FROM pomodoro_sessions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND DATE(start_time) = #{date} AND status = 'completed' GROUP BY session_type
